title: SUBWAY
blurb: Canal Street platform. The trains aren't running. Don't ask why. Clear the platform, clear the tunnel mouths, then come back up.
briefing: The MTA is not running the Lexington line tonight. There's a transfer stub for a station that doesn't exist. A rosary diagram in chalk where the route map used to be. The platform is full. The tunnel mouths are fuller. The Pawnbroker says the Mac-10 fell off a truck. You don't ask which truck.
epigraph: "Someone has clawed the route map off the platform wall."
